```{r, echo=F,output=F,warning=F}
knitr::read_chunk("lxtech/benjamin.R")

```
```{r prep,echo=F,eval=T,ouput=F}
3+4
```



```{r v2img,echo=F,eval=T,output=T,warning=F,fig.cap="corpus part of speech vector plot"}
```

```{r v2strips,echo=F,eval=T,output=T,warning=Ffig.cap="corpus NOUNS vs. VERBS plot"}
```
